subject: ts_template_match got nothing
body:
Hi all,

I run ts_template_match. First run working really well. Then I realized the 
gold particles got match a lot, so I delete the gold using fidder, 
regenerate the tomogram and perform ts_template_match again. Now, I have no 
match at all. The cc file is completely dark. The tomogram and the template 
look fine. 

Any idea why this doesn't work after fiducial removal?

H
